title: lycianthes denticulata
intro: Lycianthes denticulata, also known as the Brazilian nightshade or Brazilian honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lycianthes denticulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antimicrobial and antiviral properties.
